texto: When I write a song, I always start on acoustic guitar, because that's a good test of a song, when it's really open and bare. You can often mislead yourself if you start with computers and samples and programming because you can disguise a bad song.
explicacao: Citação de Martin Gore sobre temas ligados a lideranca. “When I write a song, I always start on acoustic guitar, because that's a good test of a song, whe…” articula lideranca, good, yourself em registro de lideranca, com relevância para contextos como yourself e guitar.
